source_intake_record.raw_question_text: Ten kilograms of some substance in a piston/cylinder arrangement exists as saturated liquid/vapor at 100 kPa,with a quality of 50%. The system is now heated so that the volume triples. The mass of the piston is such that a cylinder pressure of 200 kPa will float it. Find the heat transfer.
